title: The Mayor's Modest Proposal
summary: Mayor Maxwell Pool wants to welcome the Vaultborn properly — which, being the mayor, means putting them to work. Gather iris petals and honey so the innkeeper can brew a proper batch of Traveler's Tonic for the town stores.

steps.objective: Gather 6 Iris Petals from the meadow west of Bootstrap
steps.hint: Bit can smell the sweet ones. Follow the bees.

steps.objective: Collect 3 jars of Meadow Honey from the hives by the mill
steps.hint: The bees rotate hives in a strict order. Watch a full cycle before reaching in.
He'll be rehearsing a speech. He's always rehearsing a speech.
